ORDER RE: CONTINUE FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-21-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-11-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF VINCENT AVELLINO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUSAN GIBBS IS NOT PRESENT.
